reason: query-text \xHH escapes decode to Unicode code points where the oracle keeps raw bytes; \xff becomes U+00FF, a valid UTF-8 label name, so the expected invalid-destination-label failure cannot occur — owner-adjudicated in #165 (https://github.com/digitalis-io/pulsusdb/issues/165#issuecomment-5042719607)

query-text \xHH escapes decode to Unicode code points where the oracle keeps raw bytes; \xc5 becomes U+00C5, a valid UTF-8 label name, so the expected invalid-label-name failure cannot occur — owner-adjudicated in #165 (https://github.com/digitalis-io/pulsusdb/issues/165#issuecomment-5042719607)
